relationships.legal_significance: A Party experiencing labor disputes is not obligated to settle or make significant capital expenditures except at its sole discretion, limiting mandatory operational burdens.
relationships.evidence_quote: Nothing herein shall be construed so as to obligate any Party to settle any strike, work stoppage or other labor dispute or disturbance or to make significant capital expenditures, except in the sole discretion of the Party experiencing such difficulty

extractor_notes: The clause explicitly limits liability upon termination due to Force Majeure and preserves rights for non-excused defaults, while clarifying that labor disputes do not impose mandatory settlement or capital expenditure obligations except at the affected Party's discretion.

source_clause_title: 15.5. Regulatory Disclosures by Buyer.  This Section 16.5 will apply notwithstanding anything to the

entities.name: Buyer
entities.legal_role: The Buyer is a regulated entity subject to oversight by various regulatory and market monitoring bodies, with discretion to disclose Protected Information without Seller's consent.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer is regulated by various regulatory and market monitoring entities.

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: The Seller is the counterparty to the Buyer who provides information that may be disclosed by Buyer under regulatory requirements without prior notice or consent.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller understands and acknowledges that Buyer is regulated...

entities.name: Protected Information
entities.legal_role: Information designated as confidential or sensitive under the Agreement, which Buyer may disclose or retain under regulatory obligations without Seller's consent.
entities.evidence_quote: any information (including Protected Information)...

entities.name: NCUC, SCPSC, FERC
entities.legal_role: Specific regulatory commissions to which Buyer may disclose Protected Information without prior notice or consent from Seller.
entities.evidence_quote: any regulatory commission (inclusive of the NCUC, SCPSC, FERC)

entities.name: NERC, market monitor, office of regulatory staff, public staff, or any other regulator or legislative body
entities.legal_role: Additional regulatory and legislative entities to which Buyer may disclose Protected Information without Seller's prior notice or consent.
entities.evidence_quote: NERC, market monitor, office of regulatory staff, and/or public staff, or any other regulator or legislative body

entities.name: Docket or proceeding before regulatory commission or tribunal
entities.legal_role: A formal regulatory or judicial proceeding where Protected Information is governed by the rules of that proceeding, potentially superseding Agreement confidentiality terms.
entities.evidence_quote: In the event of the establishment of any docket or proceeding before any regulatory commission, public service commission, public utility commission, or other agency, tribunal, or court having jurisdiction over Buyer...

entities.name: Law or regulation requiring reporting
entities.legal_role: Legal or regulatory mandates that require Buyer to report certain information, including Protected Information, without prior notice or consent from Seller.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer is required by law or regulation to report certain information that could embody Protected Information

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer has the unilateral right to disclose or retain Protected Information without Seller's prior notice or consent, using its business judgment and discretion.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer is permitted, in its sole discretion, to disclose or to retain and not destroy... any information (including Protected Information)... without providing prior notice to the Seller or having obtained the consent from the Seller

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer may disclose Protected Information to specified regulatory commissions without Seller's consent or notice.
relationships.evidence_quote: to any regulatory commission (inclusive of the NCUC, SCPSC, FERC)... without providing prior notice to the Seller or having obtained the consent from the Seller

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer may disclose Protected Information to other regulatory and legislative bodies without Seller's consent or notice.
relationships.evidence_quote: NERC, market monitor, office of regulatory staff, and/or public staff, or any other regulator or legislative body without providing prior notice to the Seller or having obtained the consent from the Seller

relationships.legal_significance: Protected Information disclosed in regulatory proceedings is governed by the rules and procedures of that proceeding, which may override confidentiality provisions in the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: the Protected Information shall automatically be governed solely by the rules and procedures governing such docket or proceeding to the extent such rules or procedures are additional to, different from, or inconsistent with this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer is legally required to report certain information, including Protected Information, without prior notice or consent from Seller.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer is required by law or regulation to report certain information that could embody Protected Information from time-to-time, and Buyer may from time-to-time make such reports, without providing prior notice to Seller or consent from Seller

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer may disclose Protected Information without providing prior notice to or obtaining consent from Seller, which waives Seller's usual confidentiality protections in these contexts.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer may do so without prior notice to Seller or consent from Seller, using Buyer’s business judgment

extractor_notes: The clause explicitly grants Buyer broad discretion to disclose Protected Information to regulators and in regulatory proceedings without Seller's prior notice or consent, overriding confidentiality obligations in the Agreement. The clause also clarifies that regulatory rules governing proceedings supersede Agreement confidentiality terms to the extent of inconsistency.

source_clause_title: 19.4. Payment.  Any Net Settlement Amount will only be due and payable only to the Non-Defaulting

entities.name: Non-Defaulting Party
entities.legal_role: The party not in breach of the agreement, entitled to receive any Net Settlement Amount and recover damages upon termination.
entities.evidence_quote: Any Net Settlement Amount will only be due and payable only to the Non-Defaulting Party.

entities.name: Defaulting Party
entities.legal_role: The party in breach of the agreement whose default triggers payment obligations and potential recovery by the Non-Defaulting Party.
entities.evidence_quote: Party from and by the Defaulting Party.

entities.name: Net Settlement Amount
entities.legal_role: The monetary amount calculated upon termination representing net gains or losses, payable only to the Non-Defaulting Party under specified conditions.
entities.evidence_quote: Any Net Settlement Amount will only be due and payable only to the Non-Defaulting Party.

entities.name: Non-Defaulting Party’s aggregate Gains
entities.legal_role: The total positive financial benefits realized by the Non-Defaulting Party resulting from termination.
entities.evidence_quote: If the Non-Defaulting Party’s aggregate Gains exceed its aggregate Losses and Costs, if any, resulting from the termination of this Agreement...

entities.name: Non-Defaulting Party’s aggregate Losses and Costs
entities.legal_role: The total negative financial impacts incurred by the Non-Defaulting Party resulting from termination.
entities.evidence_quote: If the Non-Defaulting Party’s aggregate Gains exceed its aggregate Losses and Costs, if any, resulting from the termination of this Agreement...

entities.name: Performance Assurance
entities.legal_role: Security or collateral that Buyer may draw upon to recover any Net Settlement Amount.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer will be entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by drawing upon any Performance Assurance...

entities.name: Buyer
entities.legal_role: The party purchasing power, entitled to recover Net Settlement Amounts and overpayments, including by drawing on Performance Assurance.
entities.evidence_quote: Additionally, Buyer will be entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by drawing upon any Performance Assurance...

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: The party selling power, obligated to reimburse Buyer for overpayments pursuant to Section 20.6.
entities.evidence_quote: Any calculation and payment of the Net Settlement Amount will be independent of and in addition to Seller’s obligation to reimburse Buyer for overpayments pursuant to Section 20.6.

relationships.legal_significance: The Net Settlement Amount is payable only to the Non-Defaulting Party, establishing their right to receive payment upon termination.
relationships.evidence_quote: Any Net Settlement Amount will only be due and payable only to the Non-Defaulting Party.

relationships.relationship_type: No Obligation to Credit Economic Benefits
relationships.legal_significance: The Non-Defaulting Party is not required to account for or pay the Defaulting Party for economic benefits resulting from the Defaulting Party’s default, protecting the Non-Defaulting Party’s financial interests.
relationships.evidence_quote: The Non-Defaulting Party shall under no circumstances be required to account for or otherwise credit or pay the Defaulting Party for economic benefits accruing to the Non-Defaulting Party as a result of the Defaulting Party’s default.

relationships.legal_significance: The Non-Defaulting Party has the right to recover the Net Settlement Amount by netting, set-off, or pursuing damages, enabling enforcement of payment rights.
relationships.evidence_quote: The Non-Defaulting Party shall be entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by netting or set-off or to otherwise pursue recovery of damages.

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer is entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by drawing upon Performance Assurance, netting, set-off, or pursuing damages, providing multiple enforcement mechanisms.
relationships.evidence_quote: Additionally, Buyer will be entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by drawing upon any Performance Assurance or by netting or set-off, or to otherwise pursue recovery of damages.

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer may draw upon Performance Assurance to recover Net Settlement Amounts, ensuring security for payment obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer will be entitled to recover any Net Settlement Amount by drawing upon any Performance Assurance...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller is obligated to reimburse Buyer for overpayments pursuant to Section 20.6, establishing a separate financial obligation beyond Net Settlement Amounts.
relationships.evidence_quote: Any calculation and payment of the Net Settlement Amount will be independent of and in addition to Seller’s obligation to reimburse Buyer for overpayments pursuant to Section 20.6.

extractor_notes: The clause explicitly distinguishes payment rights and recovery mechanisms for the Non-Defaulting Party and Buyer, and clarifies that economic benefits accruing to the Non-Defaulting Party from the Defaulting Party’s default need not be credited back. It also separates the Net Settlement Amount payment from Seller’s reimbursement obligations under a different section.
